name: solaire/convenience-hook
title: Solaire Convenience Hook
description: Two-column "Premium Convenience" section with feature icons and an accordion.

text.default: The prestige of Solaire, anywhere you are. Experience the country's number one luxury gaming resort right from your screen. Start playing instantly.

default.title: Mobile Compatibility
default.text: You can play seamlessly on any device. Solaire Online offers optimized navigation and high-performance streaming for live gaming wherever life takes you.

default.title: Easy Payout
default.text: Fast, transparent withdrawals through trusted local payment channels. Get your winnings quickly with no hidden fees.

default.title: Hybrid Casino Games
default.text: Enjoy a unified rewards experience that bridges the physical Solaire resort with the online platform, all in one account.
